evals.prompt: Edit this testimonial, make it feel premium like Apple. Source is at /tmp/testimonial-raw.mp4, client is Thrive Retreats for Ibiza 2026 retreat.
evals.expected_output: MP4 delivered at Desktop/Thrive Retreats/Ibiza 2026 retreat/videos/edits/{date}-testimonial-edit.mp4 with apple-premium preset applied, silent segments trimmed, kinetic centered captions, name/title lower-third, slow confident motion, filmic LUT, -16 LUFS audio, thumbnail sidecar.

assertions.name: preset_chosen
assertions.description: apple-premium preset used because user said 'premium like Apple'

assertions.name: aspect_auto
assertions.description: Aspect ratio auto-detected from source and target-render-dims set accordingly

assertions.name: silence_trimmed
assertions.description: cuts.json written with silent segments >0.6s removed

assertions.name: validate_pass
assertions.description: validate_output.py exits 0 with no CRITICAL failures

assertions.name: output_location
assertions.description: File lands in Desktop/Thrive Retreats/Ibiza 2026 retreat/videos/edits/ per client-work structure

evals.prompt: Turn this raw footage into a scroll-stopping Reel — Gen-Z punchy, kinetic captions, beat sync if there's music. File is /tmp/raw-hook.mp4, for client 'Thrive Retreats / Nrsimha Caturdasi 2026'.
evals.expected_output: 9:16 1080x1920 MP4 with gen-z-punchy preset, hook-framer arc, kinetic word-by-word captions with color pops, zoom punches, hard cuts, -14 LUFS audio, snappier fade in/out.

assertions.name: preset_gen_z
assertions.description: gen-z-punchy preset chosen based on 'scroll-stopping' and 'Gen-Z' language

assertions.name: arc_hook_framer
assertions.description: hook-framer narrative arc applied (HOOK card → source → payoff)

assertions.name: lufs_14
assertions.description: Audio normalized to -14 LUFS (gen-z-punchy preset target)

assertions.name: delegates_to_hyperframes
assertions.description: Skill invokes /hyperframes with structured brief; does NOT try to author HTML itself

evals.prompt: Edit this client testimonial. Source is at /tmp/iskm-testimonial.mp4 for ISKM Singapore. Their brand colors are saffron and gold.
evals.expected_output: testimonial-trust preset applied, but DESIGN.md overrides primary/accent with saffron/gold from client brand colors, lower-third with speaker name+title, pull-quote emphasis, validate_output.py passes.

assertions.name: preset_testimonial
assertions.description: testimonial-trust preset chosen because source is a client testimonial (content type wins over any surface aesthetic)

assertions.name: brand_override
assertions.description: DESIGN.md colors use saffron + gold from user-supplied brand colors, not preset defaults

assertions.name: lower_third
assertions.description: Name/title lower-third rendered for speaker segment

assertions.name: iskm_folder
assertions.description: Output lands in Desktop/ISKM Singapore/{project}/videos/edits/ — do NOT route to Digischola brand folder
